_comment: Golden-caller ComposedPrompt baseline — captures the CURRENT (broken) prompt for the canonical Nico Grant evidence case before any Epic 100 story merges. Each story PR captures its expected diff against this baseline.
_howToReSnap: From the VM with DATABASE_URL pointed at DEV: cd apps/admin && npx tsx scripts/proof/epic-100/sim-canonical-call.ts --snap > tests/fixtures/epic-100-golden-prompt-baseline.json
_status: PLACEHOLDER — replace with live JSON capture on first VM run. See scripts/proof/epic-100/sim-canonical-call.ts.
_documentedSymptoms: RC1 — practiceQuestions section contains tutor-training MCQs (TUTOR_ONLY leak)
RC6a — modules section contains TWO lo_mastery values for the same LO (name + slug form)
RC6b — priorCallFeedback.summary names 'action_commitment' (coaching param) as weakest area
RC4 — preamble opens with criticalRules recital before any teaching activity
